text:
Sohryu may refer to:
Asuka Langley Sohryu, a character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion series.
Kyoko Zeppelin Sohryu, a character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion series.

Asuka Langley Sohryu, a character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA novel. 
Kyoko Zeppelin Sohryu, a character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA novel.
